title: Record: Compliance-First Packed Causal Memory + Dirichlet Mixing — val_bpb 0.01654407 (3-seed mean)
author: aamodbhatt

data.description: Added a packed causal n-gram memory path built from train shards and loaded at eval start.
Dirichlet-normalized multi-order mixing with count-confidence gating for n-gram evaluation.

novel_contributions: Packed causal n-gram memory path built from train shards and loaded at eval start
